MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Andrew Westly, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Paul Kokezas and Kathleen Kokezas are present.
Attorney, Scott T. Okamoto, representing the plaintiffs.

Defendant Gregory Tripousis is present.
Attorney, Lauren Cappelloni, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed. The trial date of October 22, 2007 is vacated.
